TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Jﾃ｡nos_ﾃ‥er, title = Jﾃ｡nos_ﾃ‥er, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Jﾃ｡nos_ﾃ‥er} }

S.FORM: I 1959 a miheca saka 5 folad saka 3 a romi'ad masofoc ci Jﾃ｡nos ﾃ‥er , malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Hungary anini i ci Jﾃ｡nos ﾃ‥er, patirengan a romi'ad i 2012 a miheca saka 5 folad saka 10 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: i **** a miﾄｧﾉ厂ｦa saka * fo‾uﾉｾaﾉｬ‾ﾉｮ saka * a ro‾umiﾊ｡aﾉｬ‾ﾉｮ maso‾ufo‾uﾊｦ ﾊｦi **no‾us *ﾉｬ‾ﾉｮﾉ决 , maﾉｾamiko‾umo‾uﾉｬ‾ﾉｮaj a tamﾉｬ‾ﾉｮaw. o‾u sawaraﾊ｡an no‾u kitakit no‾u ﾄｧo‾u‾uﾅ蟻rj anini i ﾊｦi **no‾us *ﾉｬ‾ﾉｮﾉ决, patirﾉ卩蟻n a ro‾umiﾊ｡aﾉｬ‾ﾉｮ i **** a miﾄｧﾉ厂ｦa saka * fo‾uﾉｾaﾉｬ‾ﾉｮ saka ** a ro‾umiﾊ｡aﾉｬ‾ﾉｮ.
S.FORM: I 1959 a miheca saka 5 folad saka 3 a romi'ad masofoc ci Jﾃ｡nos ﾃ‥er , malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Hungary anini i ci Jﾃ｡nos ﾃ‥er, patirengan a romi'ad i 2012 a miheca saka 5 folad saka 10 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: i **** a miﾄｧﾉ厂ｦa saka * fo‾uﾉｾaﾉｬ‾ﾉｮ saka * a ro‾umiﾊ｡aﾉｬ‾ﾉｮ maso‾ufo‾uﾊｦ ﾊｦi **no‾us *ﾉｬ‾ﾉｮﾉ决 , maﾉｾamiko‾umo‾uﾉｬ‾ﾉｮaj a tamﾉｬ‾ﾉｮaw. o‾u sawaraﾊ｡an no‾u kitakit no‾u ﾄｧo‾u‾uﾅ蟻rj anini i ﾊｦi **no‾us *ﾉｬ‾ﾉｮﾉ决, patirﾉ卩蟻n a ro‾umiﾊ｡aﾉｬ‾ﾉｮ i **** a miﾄｧﾉ厂ｦa saka * fo‾uﾉｾaﾉｬ‾ﾉｮ saka ** a ro‾umiﾊ｡aﾉｬ‾ﾉｮ.
